title: 16Pcs Gift Envelopes, Colourful Envelopes with Ribbon Kraft Paper Envelopes Vintage Envelopes for Valentine's day, Mother's Day, Invitation Greeting Card, Christmas Card, Graduation Card, Teacher Card
description: Product Description Specification: Material: Kraft Paper Color: colorful 13 colors Size: 17.2*12.5cm(6.77*4.92inch) Quantity: 16pcs, each envelope has a ribbon Feature: 1.Kraft paper envelope with bright color and ribbon is a good gift, different colors are suitable for different scenes. 2.Design simple portable convenience, Elegant ribbon design allows for seal fastening and better content. 3.High quality leather paper is reusable envelope, solid texture, not easy to produce wrinkles and can be stored for a long time. 4.The functional area has reasonable length and has an elegant design, which can accommodate larger size greeting cards, cash, invitations, etc. 5.Suitable for DIY design, wedding invitation, birthday and holiday card, etc. Can be used for personal or commercial use, elegant style has left unique impression.
